title: zornia pulchella
intro: Zornia pulchella, also known as the Mexican firecracker or firecracker weed, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiparasitic effects. The health benefits of Zornia pulchella include relief from fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a natural antihistamine to alleviate allergies. Herbal preparations of Zornia pulchella typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves and stems, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, or topical applications.
